title: Unit-of-work closure produces no enforced substrate record (DEC-0018/0020 unenforced) + validateProject lacks cross-block status-drift checks
description: Two coupled enforcement holes that let process/state leak out of the substrate (zero-loss goal, user 2026-05-21). (1) DEC-0020 mandates every work-unit produce typed substrate blocks (TASK/VER); DEC-0018 mandates runtime-demo + adversarial verification per step. Both are unenforced: this session three substantial units (2.1b config-declared invariants, 2.2 packaged conception, 2.3 rename engine) landed as commits + Claude Code tasks + HANDOFF prose but produced NO TASK/VER blocks (units 2.1b/2.2 have no task at all; 2.3 = TASK-044 left planned). The process-of-work is therefore not reconstructable from the substrate alone. (2) validateProject has no cross-block status-consistency check: nothing flags that TASK-044 is planned while its FGAP-060 is closed and the rename engine is shipped, or that TASK-043 is in-progress for a DEC-0036-superseded approach. The substrate cannot self-detect the lying-state condition. Intended outcome: (a) a unit-closure gate — a unit is not done until its TASK + VER (+ any DEC) are filed; (b) validateProject cross-block status-drift diagnostics (task vs its referenced gap/feature status; completed-task vs verification; task describing superseded work) so the substrate surfaces its own drift.

evidence.reference: DEC-0020 (units produce typed substrate blocks) + DEC-0018 (verify per step) — mandated but unenforced; units 2.1b/2.2/2.3 violated both
TASK-044 planned while FGAP-060 closed + engine shipped; TASK-043 in-progress for superseded in-place migration — undetected drift
validateProject has edge-integrity + config-invariants but no cross-block status-consistency (task<->gap/feature/verification) checks

impact: Process-of-work leaks out of the substrate (zero-loss violation); the substrate cannot self-detect status drift, so stale state goes silently uncaught until a human audit. Feeds the state-derivation gap (FGAP-072): derived state is only as honest as the statuses it reads.
proposed_resolution: Enforce unit-closure substrate records (TASK+VER per unit, per DEC-0018/0020) + add validateProject cross-block status-consistency diagnostics. Implementation specifics NOT prescribed (outcome-only). Lands under DEC-0040; statuses it validates feed FGAP-072 state derivation.
